series_metadata.series_description: To provide for the orderly, efficient recording of evidence pertaining to an arrest for OVI and other alcohol/drug related offenses. Form: HP-70B, HP-70B-1, HP-70K

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan e-Citation and then destroy ; Electronic: Retained in e-Citation database for five (5) years plus the current year, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
